mapper.sql: jd.tenant_id, jd.job_code, jd.schedule_type, jd.schedule_expr, jd.timezone, jd.trigger_mode, jd.calendar_code, coalesce(bc.catch_up_policy, 'NONE') as catch_up_policy, coalesce(bc.catch_up_max_days, 0) as catch_up_max_days, jd.enabled
mapper.select:
select
from batch.job_definition jd join batch.tenant t on t.tenant_id = jd.tenant_id and t.status != 'SUSPENDED' left join batch.business_calendar bc on bc.tenant_id = jd.tenant_id and bc.calendar_code = jd.calendar_code and bc.enabled = true where jd.enabled = true and jd.schedule_type in ('CRON', 'FIXED_RATE') and jd.trigger_mode in ('SCHEDULED', 'MIXED') order by jd.tenant_id, jd.job_code

select
from batch.job_definition jd left join batch.business_calendar bc on bc.tenant_id = jd.tenant_id and bc.calendar_code = jd.calendar_code and bc.enabled = true where jd.tenant_id = #{arg0} and jd.job_code = #{arg1}
